title: sideritis scordioides var. cavanillesii
intro: Sideritis scordioides var. cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' Rock Rose, is a plant species in the genus Sideritis. It is a flowering plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe, and is valued for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Sideritis scordioides var. cavanillesii can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system.
